description: Discover a unique blend of creativity and simplicity with this email template designed to inspire and engage. Perfect for blogs, newsletters, and human resources communications, it features a two-column layout and squared design that neatly organizes your content. The duotone color scheme, dominated by shades of yellow, adds a vibrant touch, making your quotes stand out. The template's focus on typography enhances readability, making it a great choice for education and wellness sectors. It's also ideal for non-profit organizations looking to boost their fundraising efforts or media and entertainment outlets seeking to increase audience engagement. On Giving Tuesday, this template can effectively convey your message. The template is not only visually appealing but also aids in maintaining a healthy mental space through inspiring quotes. Its simplicity and creativity make it a go-to choice for all your email communication needs.
short_description: Immerse in creativity with this unique email template, perfect for blogs, newsletters, and human resources. The two-column, squared layout and vibrant yellow duotone design make your quotes stand out, ideal for education, wellness, non-profit fundraising, and media engagement. Inspire with every communication.

designer.description:
My name is Andrea Dall'Ara and I'm a freelancer digital graphic designer.
I'm focused on UI design for websites, emails and applications, logo and icon design and digital illustration.

html_data:
Hello, our daily

inspirational quotes.

 
 
 

"Trust yourself you know more than you think you do"

Benjamin Spock

 

"You have as much laughter as you have faith."

Mark Twain

"All our dreams can come true, if we have the courage to pursue them."

Walt Disney

 

"Believe you can and you’re halfway there."

Theodore Roosevelt

 

Do you want more? 

Subscribe to DailyQ Extras

Far far away, behind the word mountains, far from the countries Vokalia and Consonantia, there live the blind texts. Separated they live in Bookmarksgrove right at the coast of the Semantics, a large language ocean.

LOREM IPSUM

DailyQ App - Everyday inspirational quotes © 2019

paragraph.html: "Trust yourself you know more than you think you do"
"You have as much laughter as you have faith."
"All our dreams can come true, if we have the courage to pursue them."
"Believe you can and you’re halfway there."

Far far away, behind the word mountains, far from the countries Vokalia and Consonantia, there live the blind texts. Separated they live in Bookmarksgrove right at the coast of the Semantics, a large language ocean.
